about_ivs_desc: Learn about our mission, vision, and core values.
about_us_content: At IVS, we believe in the power of education to shape the future. Our mission is to provide advanced educational and technological solutions, helping learners achieve comprehensive development and be ready for the challenges of the 21st century.
about_us_intro: IVS JSC, or Integrate Vision Synergy Joint Stock Company, was founded with the mission of providing comprehensive, high-quality educational and technological solutions in Vietnam. We are proud to be a trusted partner of many educational organizations, businesses, and individuals.
about_us_sub: Established with the mission of creating positive change through education and technology, IVS continuously strives to provide high-quality training and consulting solutions.
about_us_text: Established with the mission of creating positive change through education and technology, IVS continuously strives to provide high-quality training and consulting solutions.
academy_card_description: Discover language courses, life skills, and international certificate exam prep at IVS Academy.
academy_description: IVS Academy is a cradle for talents, offering diverse courses from foreign languages, life skills to international certificate exam prep. With a team of experienced teachers and modern teaching methods, we are committed to providing the best learning environment for our students.
academy_intro_text: Welcome to IVS Academy, where knowledge and skills take flight. We provide diverse, high-quality training programs, from English and STEAM to essential soft skills for the future.
address_detail: 1104, Group 6, Dat Moi Hamlet, Long Phuoc Commune, Long Thanh District, Dong Nai Province
address_footer: 1104, Group 6, Dat Moi Hamlet, Long Phuoc Commune, Long Thanh District, Dong Nai Province, Vietnam
ai_thinking_description: Equip yourself with AI thinking to lead in the digital era. This course not only teaches you about technology but also how to apply AI thinking to solve complex problems in work and life.
apply_now_text: Become a part of the IVS team. We are always looking for passionate and creative talents.
apps_card_description: Experience educational apps developed by IVS, making learning and management easier.

banner_subtitle: Trusted Partner for Educational and Technological Solutions

ceo_message_content: On behalf of IVS, I sincerely thank our partners, customers, and all employees who have accompanied us. We are committed to continuously striving to bring the best values, contributing to the overall development of the community.
careers_card_description: Join the IVS team to create new values for education together.
careers_desc: Explore career opportunities at IVS and become a part of our dynamic, creative team.
careers_intro: At IVS, we believe that people are our most valuable asset. We always welcome talents with the same passion, enthusiasm, and desire to contribute to the development of education and technology. Join our team to create sustainable values together.
company_name: Integrate Vision Synergy Joint Stock Company (IVS JSC)
company_profile_desc: Find out more about IVS JSC, a leading company in the field of education and technology in Vietnam.
consulting_solutions_desc: We provide in-depth consulting services on education, technology, and governance, helping partners optimize operations and achieve strategic goals.
contact_form_desc: Please fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_intro: We are always happy to hear from you. Whether you have questions about our services, need technical support, or want to collaborate, don't hesitate to contact IVS.
copyright_notice: Copyright © 2024 IVS JSC. All rights reserved.
core_values_content: Quality - Dedication - Innovation - Equality. These are the guiding values for all IVS activities, from product development to customer service.
document_library_desc: Access our rich document library, including important forms, guides, and reference materials.
education_solutions_desc: From curriculum development, teacher training to providing native English teachers, IVS offers comprehensive and effective education solutions.
edutech_solutions_desc: Pioneering the application of technology in education, we develop smart learning platforms and applications, bringing about breakthrough learning experiences.
english_placement_test_desc: Take our placement test to determine your current English proficiency and find the most suitable course for you.

establishment_consulting_desc: Do you want to establish a foreign language center, computer center, or life skills center? We provide comprehensive consulting services, from legal procedures, curriculum development to recruitment and operation.
faqs_desc: Find answers to common questions about our services, courses, and policies.
footer_about_text: IVS is a pioneer in providing comprehensive, high-quality educational and technological solutions in Vietnam.

ivs_academy_desc_1: Offering foreign language, life skills, and international certificate exam prep courses.
ivs_academy_desc_2: Experienced teaching staff and modern teaching methods.
ivs_academy_description: Enhance your knowledge and skills with diverse training programs at IVS Academy. We offer courses ranging from language, soft skills to international certificate exam prep.
ivs_academy_intro: IVS Academy is a leading training center, specializing in providing language courses, skills training, and international certificate exam preparation. With modern teaching methods and a dedicated team of teachers, we are committed to delivering the best learning experience for our students.
ivs_academy_title: IVS Academy - Where Knowledge Takes Flight
ivs_apps_desc: Explore IVS's ecosystem of educational applications, designed to support more effective learning and management.
ivs_center_care_desc: Comprehensive center management solution, helping to automate operational procedures, student care, and financial management.
ivs_education_desc_1: Develop STEAM, K-12 curricula according to international standards.
ivs_education_desc_2: Provide digital learning solutions and E-learning platforms.
ivs_education_desc_3: Organize training and professional development courses for teachers.
ivs_education_description: IVS Education focuses on researching and developing advanced curricula (STEAM, K-12), providing digital transformation solutions for educational institutions, and teacher professional development.
ivs_education_intro: IVS Education specializes in researching and developing curricula for all levels, from preschool to high school, while also providing comprehensive digital transformation solutions for the education sector.
ivs_kinder_link_desc: Smart connection app between schools, teachers, and preschool parents, helping to update children's learning and development progress daily.
ivs_quick_test_desc: Platform for creating and managing online tests quickly and easily, supporting diverse question formats and providing detailed analytical reports.
ivs_solutions_card_desc: Discover comprehensive solutions in education, technology, and consulting provided by IVS.
international_partnerships_desc: We build a global partnership network, bringing cooperation opportunities and sustainable development for domestic and foreign educational organizations.
ivs_jsc_intro: IVS JSC (Integrate Vision Synergy Joint Stock Company) is a leading unit providing comprehensive solutions in education and technology.
ivs_story_repository_desc: A rich repository of multimedia stories, helping children develop language, thinking, and imagination naturally and interestingly.
kindergarten_partnerships_desc: Comprehensive cooperation program with kindergartens, providing curricula, teachers, and extracurricular activities according to international standards.
language_center_partnerships_desc: Cooperating with foreign language centers to improve teaching quality, expand training programs, and apply modern technology.
learning_materials_desc: Access a rich repository of learning materials, including lectures, videos, and practice exercises compiled by IVS's team of experts.
legal_consulting_desc: Our team of lawyers and legal experts is ready to consult and support issues related to corporate law, investment, and intellectual property.
let_s_talk_dong_nai_desc: A community project to promote English learning and usage in Dong Nai through interactive activities and exciting events.
middle_school_partnerships_desc: Training partnership program for secondary and high school levels, focusing on academic English, STEAM, and essential skills for the future.

news_archive_desc: Review past news and events from IVS and its partners.
non_profit_desc: IVS is committed to contributing to the community through non-profit educational projects, bringing knowledge to disadvantaged groups.
our_partners_desc: We are proud to partner with reputable educational organizations and businesses both domestically and internationally to develop together and create sustainable values.
our_solutions_desc: IVS provides a comprehensive ecosystem of solutions, including education, technology, and consulting, to meet all the needs of our customers and partners.
our_team_desc: Meet the team of experts, educators, and technology enthusiasts behind IVS's success.
our_team_intro: Our team is a combination of experience, creativity, and enthusiasm. We are proud to have leading experts in education, technology, and governance, always ready to accompany your success.
partner_with_us_desc: We are always looking for opportunities to collaborate with organizations that share our vision to jointly create new values. Contact us to become an IVS partner.
primary_school_partnerships_desc: Providing enhanced English, STEAM, and life skills programs for primary schools, helping students develop comprehensively from the early years.
privacy_policy_desc: Read our privacy policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
question: Question
r_and_d_curriculum_desc: Our R&D team continuously researches and develops new curricula, integrating advanced technology and pedagogical methods.
